body: Aching for someone that gives that soft, fluttery feeling that overtakes me every time she appears, maybe a little because of nerves, but moreso because she feels like a promise of what could be. A quiet, steady kind of excitement that lodges itself in my stomach and refuses to leave, even hours after she is no longer in view…
